mapper.select:
SELECT g.group_id, g.company_id, g.group_name, g.created_at, COUNT(u.user_code) AS user_count FROM groups g LEFT JOIN users u ON g.group_id = u.group_id
g.group_name LIKE '%' || #{_parameter} || '%'
GROUP BY g.group_id, g.company_id, g.group_name, g.created_at ORDER BY g.group_id ASC
